syntax_2458.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2458.title: All Groups
syntax_2458.description:
This will return a list of all the groups currently registered by PermissionsEx.

Can be used with: 
Delete - deletes all groups registered by PermissionsEx, I personally wouldn't suggest using this

en:
This will return a list of all the groups currently registered by PermissionsEx.

Can be used with: 
Delete - deletes all groups registered by PermissionsEx, I personally wouldn't suggest using this

syntax_2469.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2469.title: Get user
syntax_2469.description: converts a player to a PermissionUser

en: converts a player to a PermissionUser

syntax_2470.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2470.title: Get group
syntax_2470.description: converts a string to a permission group

en: converts a string to a permission group

syntax_2473.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2473.title: Permission/Pex User
syntax_2473.description: This is the player based entity in PermissionsEx, for example me, Cheatchki

en: This is the player based entity in PermissionsEx, for example me, Cheatchki

syntax_2459.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2459.title: All Users
syntax_2459.description:
This will return a list of all the PermissionUsers registered by PermissionsEx.

Can be used with:
Delete - deletes all users registered by PEX, I personally wouldn't suggest ever using this

en:
This will return a list of all the PermissionUsers registered by PermissionsEx.

Can be used with:
Delete - deletes all users registered by PEX, I personally wouldn't suggest ever using this

syntax_2461.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2461.title: PexEntity's Name
syntax_2461.description: returns the name of the permission entity

en: returns the name of the permission entity

syntax_2463.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2463.title: PexEntities's permissions
syntax_2463.description:
Returns a list of all the permissions a entity has (this does include the permissions it inherits from its parents)

can be used with:
Add - adds a permission to a user
Remove - removes a permission a user

en:
Returns a list of all the permissions a entity has (this does include the permissions it inherits from its parents)

can be used with:
Add - adds a permission to a user
Remove - removes a permission a user

syntax_2471.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2471.title: Permission/Pex Entity
syntax_2471.description: This is the base of the addon, it is impossible to define something as a pex entity, BUT whereever you see it (in the documentation) you are able to feed it a permission group OR a permission user

en: This is the base of the addon, it is impossible to define something as a pex entity, BUT whereever you see it (in the documentation) you are able to feed it a permission group OR a permission user

syntax_2465.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2465.title: PexGroup's rank
syntax_2465.description:
Returns the rank of a group (used in rank-ladders)

can be used with:
set - sets the rank of a group to specified number
delete - sets the rank of a group to 0

en:
Returns the rank of a group (used in rank-ladders)

can be used with:
set - sets the rank of a group to specified number
delete - sets the rank of a group to 0

syntax_2464.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2464.title: PexEntity's prefix
syntax_2464.description:
Returns the prefix of a pex entity as defined in the PermissionsEx permission.yml file

Can be used with:
set - sets the prefix to the given string
delete - removes the prefix

en:
Returns the prefix of a pex entity as defined in the PermissionsEx permission.yml file

Can be used with:
set - sets the prefix to the given string
delete - removes the prefix

syntax_2466.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2466.title: PexEntity's Suffix
syntax_2466.description:
Returns the suffix of a permission entity as defined in PermissionsEx permissions.yml

can be used with:
set - sets the prefix to the given string
delete - removes the prefix

en:
Returns the suffix of a permission entity as defined in PermissionsEx permissions.yml

can be used with:
set - sets the prefix to the given string
delete - removes the prefix

syntax_2460.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2460.title: Default group
syntax_2460.description:
This will return the current default group in the PermissionsEx file, if a world is specified then it will return the default group of that world

Can be used with:
Set - sets the default group

en:
This will return the current default group in the PermissionsEx file, if a world is specified then it will return the default group of that world

Can be used with:
Set - sets the default group

syntax_2462.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2462.title: PexEntities' Parents
syntax_2462.description:
Returns a list of all the entities parents/groups

Can be used with:
add - adds specified permission group to the entities parents
remove - removes specified permission group to the entities parents

en:
Returns a list of all the entities parents/groups

Can be used with:
add - adds specified permission group to the entities parents
remove - removes specified permission group to the entities parents

syntax_2467.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2467.title: PexGroup's users
syntax_2467.description:
Returns a list of permission users that are in a group

can be used with:
add - adds the group to the specified user
remove - remove the group grom the specified user

en:
Returns a list of permission users that are in a group

can be used with:
add - adds the group to the specified user
remove - remove the group grom the specified user

syntax_2468.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2468.title: PexGroup's weight
syntax_2468.description:
Returns the weight of a given group

Can be used with:
set - sets the weight to specified number
delete - sets the weight to 0

en:
Returns the weight of a given group

Can be used with:
set - sets the weight to specified number
delete - sets the weight to 0

syntax_2472.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2472.title: Permission/Pex Group
syntax_2472.description: this is the group based entity from PermissionsEx, for example Admin  is a fairly common group

en: this is the group based entity from PermissionsEx, for example Admin  is a fairly common group

syntax_2474.creator: cheatchki
syntax_2474.title: Create Entity
syntax_2474.description: If you want to be able to create a user/group from skript, then you will have to use this at some point or else, the entity will not be saved to the config

en: If you want to be able to create a user/group from skript, then you will have to use this at some point or else, the entity will not be saved to the config
